title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 417.340 - Penalty
text:
417.340.  Penalty. — Any person offending against any provision of sections 417.300 to 417.360 shall be deemed guilty of a misdemeanor, and upon conviction thereof by a court of competent jurisdiction shall be punished by a fine of not less than five dollars nor more than twenty-five dollars, and each receptacle unlawfully dealt with as herein provided shall be deemed and held to constitute a separate offense.
(RSMo 1939 § 14092, A. 1949 H.B. 2111) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12453; 1919 § 12024
